description: A vertical designed share-card graphic styled like a Fox News social-media post, layering a news headline over operational photos. The top has a torn-paper white band with the red, white and blue 'FOX NEWS channel' logo centered. Below is a small red 'CALIFORNIA' kicker tag, then a bold black headline: 'ICE arrests 100+ illegal alien truckers in major sweep after deadly crashes across multiple states'. The lower portion shows a full-width operational photo of a group of detained men (faces blurred) lined up and being processed by officers wearing tactical gear and vests labeled 'POLICE / U.S. CUSTOMS AND BORDER PROTECTION' and high-visibility yellow 'USCG' (Coast Guard) vests. Inset at lower right is a smaller bordered photo of officers inspecting a red semi-truck cab (numbered 8205) with a shipping container, an inspector in an orange hi-vis vest. The composition combines borrowed news-media credibility with documentary enforcement imagery to publicize 'Operation Highway Sentinel.' Messaging technique: public-safety framing (deadly crashes, making roads safe for Christmas) and tough-on-immigration enforcement, taking a swipe at California sanctuary policies. Target audience: general public and supporters of immigration enforcement.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; CALIFORNIA; ICE arrests 100+ illegal alien truckers in major sweep after deadly crashes across multiple states; POLICE U.S. CUSTOMS AND BORDER PROTECTION; USCG
